overview: A Frappe custom app that integrates ERPNext HRMS with LHDN MyInvois for Malaysian e-Invoice compliance. When a Salary Slip or Expense Claim is submitted, the app evaluates LHDN exemption rules, asynchronously builds a UBL 2.1 XML self-billed e-Invoice (type '11'), submits it to LHDN via HTTP POST (base64+SHA-256 wrapped), writes the UUID/QR/status back to ERPNext, and handles polling, retries, cancellation, and monthly consolidation. Built on top of the installed myinvois_erpgulf app tddRules.greenPhaseGate: US-NNN acceptance criteria include a [TDD GREEN] criterion requiring bench run-tests to PASS with zero failures.
tddRules.noPassesWithoutTests: US stories cannot be marked passes:true unless their paired UT story is passes:true first.
tddRules.benchCommand: Each story specifies the exact bench --site frontend run-tests --module command to use for verification.

userStories.title: Write failing tests for app scaffold

Use frappe.get_installed_apps() to assert 'lhdn_payroll_integration' is present
FrappeTestCase base: from frappe.tests.utils import FrappeTestCase
userStories.passesWhen: Test file is written AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_app_scaffold shows failures (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Create custom app scaffold
userStories.description: Create a new Frappe custom app named lhdn_payroll_integration using bench new-app. Configure hooks.py with the correct app metadata, doc_events for Salary Slip and Expense Claim (on_submit, on_cancel), scheduler_events (hourly status poller, monthly consolidation), after_install and after_migrate hooks, and fixtures configuration. Create modules.txt with a single line 'LHDN Payroll Integration'. Create a stub install.py with after_install() and after_migrate() functions. The app must be installable via bench --site frontend install-app lhdn_payroll_integration.
acceptanceCriteria: bench --site frontend list-apps shows lhdn_payroll_integration
hooks.py contains doc_events for Salary Slip and Expense Claim (on_submit, on_cancel)
hooks.py contains scheduler_events with hourly and monthly entries
modules.txt exists with content 'LHDN Payroll Integration'
install.py exists with after_install() and after_migrate() stubs

confirming the TDD red phase
Every acceptance criterion of paired US-002 has at least one corresponding test method
technicalNotes: Test class: TestEmployeeCustomFields(FrappeTestCase)

Test methods: test_employee_lhdn_section_exists, test_requires_self_billed_invoice_is_check_field, test_lhdn_tin_field_exists, test_id_type_options, test_id_value_field_exists, test_msic_code_link_field, test_is_foreign_worker_field, test_bank_account_number_field, test_all_fields_have_correct_module
Use frappe.get_meta('Employee').get_field('custom_requires_self_billed_invoice') to assert field existence
Assert fieldtype, default value, module attributes on each field
userStories.passesWhen: Test file is written AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_custom_fields shows failures (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Add custom fields to Employee DocType
userStories.description: Add 8 custom fields to the Employee DocType under a new 'LHDN Malaysia Setup' section. These fields store the LHDN tax metadata required for self-billed e-Invoice payload generation. Define them in fixtures/custom_fields.json and apply via after_install. The master boolean field custom_requires_self_billed_invoice controls whether any LHDN processing happens for that employee.
acceptanceCriteria: Employee record shows 'LHDN Malaysia Setup' section with all 8 fields after app install
custom_requires_self_billed_invoice is a Check field defaulting to 0
custom_lhdn_tin, custom_id_type, custom_id_value become mandatory when custom_requires_self_billed_invoice is checked
custom_msic_code is a Link field to LHDN MSIC Code DocType
custom_is_foreign_worker is a Check field
custom_bank_account_number is a Data field

confirming the TDD red phase
Every acceptance criterion of paired US-003 has at least one corresponding test method
technicalNotes: Test class: TestSalaryComponentCustomFields(FrappeTestCase)
Test methods: test_lhdn_classification_code_field_exists, test_classification_code_options_contain_022, test_field_is_optional, test_field_persists_after_save
Assert frappe.get_meta('Salary Component').get_field('custom_lhdn_classification_code') is not None
Assert '022' in field.options and '037' in field.options
userStories.passesWhen: Test class is added AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_custom_fields shows failures (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Add custom field to Salary Component DocType
userStories.description: Add one custom field to Salary Component: custom_lhdn_classification_code (Select). This allows the finance team to assign an LHDN classification code to each salary component, which the payload builder reads when constructing InvoiceLine elements. Include all payroll-relevant classification codes as options.
acceptanceCriteria: Salary Component record shows custom_lhdn_classification_code dropdown

confirming the TDD red phase
Every acceptance criterion of paired US-004 has at least one corresponding test method
technicalNotes: Test class: TestSalarySlipCustomFields(FrappeTestCase)

Test methods: test_lhdn_status_section_exists, test_lhdn_status_options, test_uuid_is_read_only, test_submission_datetime_is_datetime_field, test_retry_count_defaults_to_zero, test_is_consolidated_defaults_to_zero, test_qr_code_is_read_only, test_error_log_is_read_only
Assert field.read_only == 1 for UUID, QR, error_log, datetimes, retry_count, is_consolidated
Assert field.options contains 'Pending', 'Valid', 'Invalid', 'Exempt', 'Cancelled'
userStories.passesWhen: Test class is added AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_custom_fields shows failures (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Add custom fields to Salary Slip DocType
userStories.description: Add 10 custom fields to Salary Slip to store LHDN API response data. All response fields (UUID, QR, status, timestamps, error log) must be read_only=1 so they can only be written by the background worker. custom_lhdn_status is the primary status field with a defined option set.
acceptanceCriteria: Salary Slip shows 'LHDN e-Invoice Status' section with all 10 fields after submit

custom_lhdn_status Select has options: (blank)
Pending
Submitted
Valid
Invalid
Exempt
Cancelled
custom_lhdn_uuid, custom_lhdn_qr_code, custom_lhdn_qr_url, custom_error_log are read_only
custom_lhdn_submission_datetime and custom_lhdn_validated_datetime are Datetime fields, read_only
custom_retry_count is Int field, read_only, default 0

confirming the TDD red phase
Every acceptance criterion of paired US-005 has at least one corresponding test method
technicalNotes: Test class: TestExpenseClaimCustomFields(FrappeTestCase)
Test methods: test_lhdn_section_exists, test_expense_category_options, test_receipt_fields_are_editable, test_status_fields_are_read_only, test_retry_count_default
Assert custom_expense_category.read_only == 0 (editable)
Assert custom_employee_receipt_uuid.read_only == 0 (editable)
Assert 'Self-Billed Required', 'Employee Receipt Provided', 'Overseas - Exempt' in field.options
userStories.passesWhen: Test class is added AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_custom_fields shows failures (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Add custom fields to Expense Claim DocType
userStories.description: Add 9 custom fields to Expense Claim. The key addition is custom_expense_category (Select, editable) which determines the compliance pathway: Self-Billed Required triggers e-Invoice submission, Employee Receipt Provided stores the employee's existing receipt UUID/QR, and Overseas - Exempt bypasses submission entirely.
acceptanceCriteria: Expense Claim shows 'LHDN e-Invoice' section with all 9 fields

custom_expense_category options: (blank)
Self-Billed Required
Employee Receipt Provided
Overseas - Exempt
custom_employee_receipt_uuid and custom_employee_receipt_qr_url are editable (not read_only)

userStories.passesWhen: Test file is written AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_msic_code shows failures (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Create LHDN MSIC Code DocType and seed fixture data
userStories.description: Create a new DocType named 'LHDN MSIC Code' to serve as a lookup table for Malaysian Standard Industrial Classification codes. Fields: code (Data, name), description (Data), sector (Data). Seed with at least the 4 minimum required codes plus fetch the full list from https://sdk.myinvois.hasil.gov.my/codes/msic-codes/ if accessible. Save seed data in fixtures/lhdn_msic_codes.json.
acceptanceCriteria: frappe.get_all('LHDN MSIC Code') returns at least 4 records after install
Code 78300 (Labour supply services) exists
Code 00000 (Not Applicable) exists
Employee custom_msic_code Link field can select '78300'

Use unittest.mock.MagicMock to create mock doc objects with custom_ attributes
userStories.passesWhen: Test file is written AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_exemption_filter shows ImportError (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Implement exemption filter service
userStories.description: Create lhdn_payroll_integration/services/exemption_filter.py with a function should_submit_to_lhdn(doctype, doc) -> bool. For Salary Slips: returns False if employee.custom_requires_self_billed_invoice is False or doc.net_pay <= 0; otherwise True. For Expense Claims: returns False for 'Overseas - Exempt' and 'Employee Receipt Provided' categories; True for 'Self-Billed Required' if employee flag is set. All other cases return False (safe default).
acceptanceCriteria: should_submit_to_lhdn('Salary Slip', doc) returns False when employee.custom_requires_self_billed_invoice = 0
should_submit_to_lhdn('Salary Slip', doc) returns True when employee.custom_requires_self_billed_invoice = 1 and net_pay > 0
should_submit_to_lhdn('Salary Slip', doc) returns False when net_pay <= 0
should_submit_to_lhdn('Expense Claim', doc) returns False when custom_expense_category = 'Overseas - Exempt'
should_submit_to_lhdn('Expense Claim', doc) returns False when custom_expense_category = 'Employee Receipt Provided'

technicalNotes: File: lhdn_payroll_integration/services/exemption_filter.py
Function signature: def should_submit_to_lhdn(doctype: str, doc) -> bool
Load employee doc via frappe.get_doc('Employee', doc.employee)
For Salary Slip: check employee.custom_requires_self_billed_invoice == 1 AND doc.net_pay > 0
For Expense Claim: check doc.custom_expense_category == 'Self-Billed Required' AND employee.custom_requires_self_billed_invoice == 1
Return False as safe default for any unrecognised combination

userStories.title: Write failing tests for on_submit hooks

will fail until implemented
Use unittest.mock.patch to mock frappe.enqueue and frappe.db.set_value
Assert frappe.enqueue was called with enqueue_after_commit=True when contractor slip submitted
userStories.passesWhen: Test file is written AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_submission_hooks shows ImportError (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Implement on_submit hooks with async enqueue
userStories.description: Create lhdn_payroll_integration/services/submission_service.py with enqueue_salary_slip_submission(doc, method) and enqueue_expense_claim_submission(doc, method). Each function: (1) calls the exemption filter and sets custom_lhdn_status='Exempt' then returns if not in scope; (2) validates document name length; (3) calls frappe.enqueue with enqueue_after_commit=True; (4) sets custom_lhdn_status='Pending'. The enqueue_after_commit=True parameter is critical to prevent DoesNotExistError in the background worker.
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting a standard employee Salary Slip sets custom_lhdn_status = 'Exempt' and enqueues NO job
Submitting a contractor Salary Slip sets custom_lhdn_status = 'Pending' and a job appears in the Redis queue
Submitting an Expense Claim with category 'Overseas - Exempt' sets custom_lhdn_status = 'Exempt'
frappe.enqueue is called with enqueue_after_commit=True, queue='short', timeout=300

userStories.passesWhen: Test file is written AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_payload_builder shows ImportError (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Implement UBL 2.1 XML payload builder for Salary Slip
userStories.description: Create the UBL 2.1 XML builder for self-billed Salary Slip e-Invoices in lhdn_payroll_integration/services/payload_builder.py. The builder uses Python's xml.etree.ElementTree with the exact LHDN UBL namespaces. Self-billed inversion: Employer = Buyer (payer), Contractor = Supplier (payee). e-Invoice type code = '11'. Financial totals MUST be calculated from doc.earnings child table only never from YTD fields or compute_year_to_date() (v16 bug). All monetary values use decimal.Decimal with ROUND_HALF_UP. The function also provides prepare_submission_wrapper() which wraps the XML in the LHDN HTTP submission format (base64 + SHA-256).
acceptanceCriteria: build_salary_slip_xml(docname) returns a valid XML string with root element <Invoice xmlns='urn:oasis:names:specification:ubl:schema:xsd:Invoice-2'>
InvoiceTypeCode element contains '11'
AccountingSupplierParty contains employee TIN and name (payee = supplier)
AccountingCustomerParty contains company TIN and name (payer = buyer)
For foreign worker employee, SupplierTIN = 'EI00000000010'
TotalExcludingTax + TotalTaxAmount == TotalIncludingTax (exact Decimal equality, 2dp)
YTD fields (doc.ytd_net_pay, doc.year_to_date) are never accessed

technicalNotes: File: lhdn_payroll_integration/services/payload_builder.py

UBL namespaces: UBL_NS='urn:oasis:names:specification:ubl:schema:xsd:Invoice-2', CAC_NS='urn:oasis:names:specification:ubl:schema:xsd:CommonAggregateComponents-2', CBC_NS='urn:oasis:names:specification:ubl:schema:xsd:CommonBasicComponents-2'
Register namespaces with ET.register_namespace before building
InvoiceTypeCode: <cbc:InvoiceTypeCode listVersionID='1.1'>11</cbc:InvoiceTypeCode>
Calculate totals: total_excl = sum(quantize(Decimal(str(e.amount))) for e in doc.earnings)
Tax: total_tax = Decimal('0.00'), tax category ID = 'E' (Exempt)

userStories.passesWhen: Test class is added AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_payload_builder shows failures (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Implement UBL 2.1 XML payload builder for Expense Claim
userStories.description: Add build_expense_claim_xml(docname) to payload_builder.py. Structure is identical to Salary Slip builder with the same buyer/supplier inversion, but line items come from doc.expenses child table (Expense Claim Detail rows). Use doc.total_sanctioned_amount as TotalIncludingTax. The Expense Type DocType should also have custom_lhdn_classification_code field added (classification 027 = Reimbursement is the typical default).
acceptanceCriteria: build_expense_claim_xml(docname) returns valid UBL XML with InvoiceTypeCode = '11'
Line items correspond to doc.expenses rows (not doc.earnings)
TotalIncludingTax equals doc.total_sanctioned_amount as Decimal with 2dp
Same buyer/supplier inversion as Salary Slip builder

will fail until implemented
Use unittest.mock.patch to mock requests.post, get_access_token, frappe.db.set_value
Mock 202 response with acceptedDocuments and rejectedDocuments variants
userStories.passesWhen: Test file is written AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_submission_service shows ImportError (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Implement submission service: HTTP POST to LHDN and response writer
userStories.description: Add process_salary_slip(docname) and process_expense_claim(docname) to submission_service.py. Each function: (1) builds XML via payload_builder; (2) calls _post_to_lhdn() which fetches a bearer token from myinvois_erpgulf.taxpayerlogin.get_access_token(), constructs the submission URL from site config, and POSTs the wrapper JSON; (3) calls _write_response_to_doc() to parse the 202 response and update the Frappe document. Network errors (ConnectionError, Timeout) route to retry; other exceptions write Invalid status.
acceptanceCriteria: process_salary_slip(docname) calls build_salary_slip_xml then POSTs to LHDN
On 202 with acceptedDocuments: custom_lhdn_status = 'Submitted', custom_lhdn_uuid populated
On 202 with rejectedDocuments: custom_lhdn_status = 'Invalid', custom_error_log populated
On requests.Timeout or ConnectionError: schedule_retry() is called, status stays 'Pending'
Token is fetched via get_access_token(company_name) from myinvois_erpgulf.myinvois_erpgulf.taxpayerlogin
On 401 response: token is refreshed once and request retried

technicalNotes: Import: from myinvois_erpgulf.myinvois_erpgulf.taxpayerlogin import get_access_token

userStories.title: Write failing tests for validation + decimal + date utils

userStories.passesWhen: All three test files are written AND all three bench run-tests commands show ImportError (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Implement input validation and sanitization utilities
userStories.description: Create lhdn_payroll_integration/utils/validation.py with all LHDN-mandated pre-flight validation rules. Create lhdn_payroll_integration/utils/decimal_utils.py with quantize() and assert_totals_balance(). Create lhdn_payroll_integration/utils/date_utils.py with to_lhdn_datetime() and to_lhdn_date(). These utilities are used by payload_builder.py.
acceptanceCriteria: validate_tin('IG12345', 'NRIC') raises frappe.ValidationError (wrong length)
validate_tin('IG12345678901', 'NRIC') returns 'IG12345678901' (valid)
validate_tin for foreign worker returns 'EI00000000010' regardless of input
validate_document_name_length on name > 50 chars returns a 50-char truncation and logs warning
quantize(Decimal('0.1') + Decimal('0.2')) == Decimal('0.30') (no float error)
assert_totals_balance(Decimal('100'), Decimal('0'), Decimal('100.01')) raises ValueError
to_lhdn_date(date_value) returns YYYY-MM-DD string, raises ValueError on 'N/A' or empty

awaiting final validation), fetches their current status from the LHDN API using the stored custom_lhdn_uuid, and updates the document to 'Valid' (Status 2) or 'Invalid' (Status 3). Process in batches of 100 to avoid timeouts. Errors per-document are logged but don't abort the batch.
acceptanceCriteria: poll_pending_documents() queries both Salary Slip and Expense Claim for status='Submitted'
Documents with valid UUID are queried against LHDN GET /api/v1.0/documents/{uuid}/details
Status 2 response -> custom_lhdn_status = 'Valid', custom_lhdn_validated_datetime set
Status 3 response -> custom_lhdn_status = 'Invalid', custom_error_log populated
Documents without UUID are skipped
Individual document errors are caught and logged without aborting the full batch

technicalNotes: File: lhdn_payroll_integration/services/status_poller.py
LHDN status endpoint: GET {base_url}/api/v1.0/documents/{uuid}/details
Headers: Authorization: Bearer {token}
Response: document details including status field (submitted/valid/invalid/cancelled)
Map LHDN status strings to ERPNext values: valid -> 'Valid', invalid -> 'Invalid', submitted -> 'Submitted'
Fetch token from Company.custom_bearer_token or call get_access_token()
Use frappe.get_all with limit=100 and filters={'custom_lhdn_status': 'Submitted', 'custom_lhdn_uuid': ['!=', '']}
Wrap each document's poll in try/except; use frappe.log_error on failure

userStories.title: Write failing tests for Status 3 error log parser

userStories.passesWhen: Test file is written AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_error_parser shows failures (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Implement Status 3 error log parser
userStories.description: Add _format_error_log() and _format_rejection_errors() to the codebase (status_poller.py and submission_service.py respectively). These functions parse LHDN JSON error responses into human-readable text written to custom_error_log. The formatted output should show [ERROR_CODE] fieldName: message for each error, followed by the raw JSON for debugging.
acceptanceCriteria: _format_error_log(response) with 2 errors returns string with exactly 2 [CODE] field: message lines
Raw JSON is appended after the formatted lines
Empty errors array returns 'LHDN returned Invalid status with no error details'
custom_error_log on a rejected Salary Slip contains human-readable error text

userStories.title: Write failing tests for exponential backoff retry

userStories.passesWhen: Test file is written AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_retry_service shows ImportError (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Implement exponential backoff retry service
userStories.description: Create lhdn_payroll_integration/services/retry_service.py with schedule_retry(doctype, docname, error). technicalNotes: File: lhdn_payroll_integration/services/retry_service.py
Backoff formula: wait_seconds = min(2 ** retry_count * 60, 3600)
Max retries: 5 (on the 5th failure, set invalid)
Retry count stored in custom_retry_count field on the document
frappe.enqueue with queue='long' and the at= parameter (if supported) or use frappe.utils.add_to_date for scheduling
Function target: 'lhdn_payroll_integration.services.submission_service.process_salary_slip' or process_expense_claim
Import in submission_service.py: from lhdn_payroll_integration.services.retry_service import schedule_retry

userStories.title: Write failing tests for cancellation hook (72h window)

will fail until implemented
Use unittest.mock.patch('frappe.utils.now_datetime') to simulate time passage
Assert frappe.ValidationError is raised with assertRaises when past 72 hours
userStories.passesWhen: Test file is written AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_cancellation shows ImportError (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Implement on_cancel hook with 72-hour window check
userStories.description: Create lhdn_payroll_integration/services/cancellation_service.py with handle_salary_slip_cancel(doc, method) and handle_expense_claim_cancel(doc, method). If the document has not been submitted to LHDN, allow native cancellation. If submitted within 72 hours of validation, enqueue an async cancellation job. If past 72 hours, raise frappe.ValidationError with clear guidance to issue a Credit Note (type 12 for self-billed) instead.
acceptanceCriteria: Cancelling a Salary Slip with custom_lhdn_status='Exempt' allows native cancel (no LHDN call)
Cancelling a Salary Slip validated 10 hours ago enqueues a cancellation job
Cancelling a Salary Slip validated 96 hours ago raises frappe.ValidationError with credit note guidance
frappe.ValidationError message mentions 'Credit Note' and '72 hours'

ALL tests pass. Zero failures, zero errors.
technicalNotes: File: lhdn_payroll_integration/services/cancellation_service.py
Check: if doc.custom_lhdn_status not in ['Valid', 'Submitted']: return (allow native cancel)
Reference time: custom_lhdn_validated_datetime OR custom_lhdn_submission_datetime
hours_elapsed = (frappe.utils.now_datetime() - reference_time).total_seconds() / 3600
If hours_elapsed <= 72: frappe.enqueue cancellation job with enqueue_after_commit=True

If hours_elapsed > 72: frappe.throw('This e-Invoice was validated more than 72 hours ago and cannot be directly cancelled. Please issue a Self-Billed Credit Note (type 12) to reverse this transaction.', frappe.ValidationError)
LHDN cancellation endpoint: PUT {base_url}/api/v1.0/documents/{uuid}/state with body {status: 'cancelled', reason: '...'}

userStories.title: Write failing tests for async LHDN cancellation job

Mock requests.put: 200 response for success, 400 response for error
Assert frappe.get_doc(...).cancel() was called on success and NOT called on error
userStories.passesWhen: Test class is added AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_cancellation shows failures (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Implement async LHDN cancellation job
userStories.description: Add process_cancellation(doctype, docname) to cancellation_service.py. This background worker calls the LHDN PUT /documents/{uuid}/state endpoint with status='cancelled'. On success: set custom_lhdn_status='Cancelled' and cancel the Frappe document programmatically. On LHDN API rejection: keep status 'Valid' and write error to custom_error_log see ERPNext document'}
On success: frappe.db.set_value(doctype, docname, 'custom_lhdn_status', 'Cancelled'), then frappe.get_doc(doctype, docname).cancel()
The .cancel() call must use ignore_permissions=True since this runs in a background job context
On HTTP error: parse response JSON for error message, write to custom_error_log via frappe.db.set_value

userStories.title: Write failing tests for monthly consolidation scheduler

Use unittest.mock.patch to mock frappe.get_all, frappe.db.set_value, and submission_service calls
userStories.passesWhen: Test file is written AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_consolidation shows ImportError (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Implement monthly consolidation scheduler
userStories.description: Create lhdn_payroll_integration/services/consolidation_service.py with run_monthly_consolidation(). This monthly scheduled job finds all Salary Slips and Expense Claims with custom_lhdn_status='Pending' and custom_is_consolidated=0 from the previous calendar month, applies the RM 10,000 high-value override (those must be submitted individually), and submits the remainder as a single consolidated e-Invoice payload. Updates all processed documents with custom_is_consolidated=1.
acceptanceCriteria: run_monthly_consolidation() queries previous calendar month's pending Salary Slips and Expense Claims
Documents with total > 10000 are excluded from the batch and submitted individually
Remaining documents are grouped into one consolidated submission
After successful submission, all included documents have custom_is_consolidated = 1
Documents already submitted (status != 'Pending') are not included

technicalNotes: File: lhdn_payroll_integration/services/consolidation_service.py
Calculate previous month date range using frappe.utils.get_first_day() and get_last_day()
Query filters: custom_lhdn_status='Pending', custom_is_consolidated=0, posting_date in previous month range
High-value filter: if doc.net_pay > 10000 (Salary Slip) or doc.total_sanctioned_amount > 10000 (Expense Claim): submit individually via submission_service, not in batch
RM 10,000 threshold is per-document (not aggregate)
After batch submission: frappe.db.set_value for each doc: custom_is_consolidated=1

userStories.title: Write failing tests for consolidated payload builder

Use a list of mock docnames and assert len(InvoiceLines) == len(docnames)
userStories.passesWhen: Test class is added AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_payload_builder shows failures (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Implement consolidated payload builder (classification code 004)
userStories.description: Add build_consolidated_xml(docnames, target_month) to payload_builder.py. This builds a single UBL 2.1 XML that aggregates multiple Salary Slip or Expense Claim documents into one e-Invoice. Key differences from individual: InvoiceCode = CONSOL-{company}-{YYYY-MM}, BillingPeriod = full target month, one InvoiceLine per source document (not per salary component), classification code on line items = '004', buyer contact can be 'NA'.
acceptanceCriteria: build_consolidated_xml(docnames, '2026-01') returns valid UBL XML
Each InvoiceLine corresponds to one source document (len(InvoiceLines) == len(docnames))
ItemClassificationCode = '004' on all line items
InvoiceCode follows pattern CONSOL-{company_abbr}-{YYYY-MM} (max 50 chars)
BillingPeriodStartDate = first day of target month, EndDate = last day
TotalIncludingTax = sum of all individual document net amounts (Decimal)
TotalExcludingTax + TotalTaxAmount == TotalIncludingTax (exact Decimal equality)

will fail until implemented
Use unittest.mock.patch('frappe.conf.get') to set lhdn_environment values
test_no_hardcoded_urls: use grep or ast.parse to scan .py files for hardcoded URLs
userStories.passesWhen: Test file is written AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_config shows failures (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Implement environment toggle (sandbox / production)
userStories.description: Ensure all LHDN API calls read the target environment from Frappe site config. The environment is set via bench set-config: lhdn_environment (sandbox or production), lhdn_sandbox_url, lhdn_production_url, lhdn_einvoice_version. All submission, polling, and cancellation functions must use these config values to construct API URLs. No URL should be hardcoded in Python files.
acceptanceCriteria: With lhdn_environment='sandbox' in site config, all API calls go to preprod-api.myinvois.hasil.gov.my
With lhdn_environment='production' in site config, all API calls go to api.myinvois.hasil.gov.my
lhdn_einvoice_version controls the listVersionID attribute on InvoiceTypeCode element
Missing config key lhdn_environment defaults to 'sandbox' (safe default)

confirming the TDD red phase
Every acceptance criterion of paired US-021 has at least one corresponding test method
technicalNotes: Test class: TestRBAC(FrappeTestCase)
Test methods: test_hr_user_cannot_see_lhdn_uuid_field, test_hr_manager_can_see_all_lhdn_fields, test_requires_self_billed_field_restricted_to_hr_manager
Use frappe.get_meta('Salary Slip').get_field('custom_lhdn_uuid').permlevel to assert permlevel >= 1
Use frappe.has_permission('Salary Slip', 'read', user=hr_user_name, permlevel=1) to assert HR User cannot read permlevel=1 fields
Test setup: create test users with HR User and HR Manager roles using FrappeTestCase fixtures
userStories.passesWhen: Test file is written AND bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_rbac shows AssertionError (red phase confirmed)

userStories.title: Implement role-based access control for LHDN fields
userStories.description: Restrict access to sensitive LHDN response fields (UUID, QR code, error log) to HR Manager and System Manager roles. Add a manual resubmission button on Salary Slip and Expense Claim that is visible only to System Manager. Standard HR Users should not see UUIDs or QR codes.
acceptanceCriteria: User with only 'HR User' role cannot see custom_lhdn_uuid field
User with 'HR Manager' role can see all custom_lhdn_* fields
Manual resubmission button (if added as custom button in JS) is visible only to System Manager

technicalNotes: Use Frappe's Permission table or field-level permlevel to restrict visibility
permlevel=1 on custom_lhdn_uuid, custom_lhdn_qr_code, custom_lhdn_qr_url, custom_error_log fields
Add Read permission at permlevel=1 to HR Manager and System Manager roles via DocType permissions
Alternatively, use field-level hide using depends_on or client-side JS checking frappe.user_roles
Add to fixtures if using DocType permissions
Add public/js/salary_slip.js with form button: if frappe.user.has_role('System Manager') show resubmit button

userStories.title: All 5 mandatory LHDN integration test scenarios pass in sandbox
userStories.description: Create lhdn_payroll_integration/tests/ with test files covering all 5 LHDN-mandated test scenarios. Tests must run against the LHDN sandbox (preprod-api.myinvois.hasil.gov.my) using real sandbox credentials. T-01 to T-05 must all pass. Also create unit tests for the key utility functions (decimal precision, TIN validation, exemption filter).
acceptanceCriteria: T-01: Submit standard employee Salary Slip -> custom_lhdn_status='Exempt', zero LHDN API calls
T-02: Submit contractor Salary Slip (valid data) -> custom_lhdn_status='Valid' (after polling), UUID non-empty, QR URL non-empty
T-03: Submit contractor Salary Slip with bad TIN -> custom_lhdn_status='Invalid', custom_error_log contains error text
T-04: Simulate network timeout -> custom_retry_count=1, status remains 'Pending', retry job in Redis queue
T-05: run_monthly_consolidation() manually -> one code-004 payload submitted, all eligible slips have custom_is_consolidated=1
Unit test: quantize(0.1 + 0.2) == Decimal('0.30')
Unit test: validate_tin('IG123', 'NRIC') raises frappe.ValidationError

technicalNotes: Create lhdn_payroll_integration/tests/test_exemption_filter.py, test_payload_builder.py, test_validation.py, test_decimal_utils.py, test_cancellation.py
For T-03: create an Employee with TIN deliberately set to invalid value, OR mock validate_tin to pass a bad TIN to the API
For T-04: mock requests.post to raise requests.Timeout on first call, succeed on second
For T-02: requires real LHDN sandbox credentials in site config (custom_client_id, custom_client_secret on Company doc)
For T-05: create test Salary Slip records in previous month with status='Pending', run consolidation, verify results
Unit tests use frappe.tests.utils.FrappeTestCase base class
Run tests: bench --site frontend run-tests --app lhdn_payroll_integration

userStories.title: Write failing tests for Self-Billed Credit Note (type 12) flow
userStories.description: Write test file lhdn_payroll_integration/tests/test_credit_note.py. Tests cover: a credit_note_service that issues a type-12 UBL XML; BillingReference containing the original invoice UUID; InvoiceTypeCode='12'; cancellation_service raises ValidationError with clear 'issue Credit Note' message. Do NOT implement production code in this story.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file lhdn_payroll_integration/tests/test_credit_note.py created with class TestSelfBilledCreditNote containing all test methods
bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_credit_note FAILS with ImportError -- confirming the TDD red phase
Every acceptance criterion of paired US-023 has at least one corresponding test method

technicalNotes: File: lhdn_payroll_integration/utils/qr_utils.py
Add qrcode to requirements.txt or install in Dockerfile.myinvois: pip install 'qrcode[pil]'

generate_qr_code_base64(url): if not url: return ''; import qrcode, io, base64; qr=qrcode.make(url); buffer=io.BytesIO(); qr.save(buffer, format='PNG'); return 'data:image/png;base64,' + base64.b64encode(buffer.getvalue()).decode()
hooks.py: jinja = {'methods': ['lhdn_payroll_integration.utils.qr_utils.generate_qr_code_base64']}
Print format HTML: {% if doc.custom_lhdn_status in ['Valid','Submitted'] and doc.custom_lhdn_qr_url %}{% endif %}

userStories.title: Implement 7-year LHDN audit retention archival and locking
userStories.description: Create lhdn_payroll_integration/services/retention_service.py with run_retention_archival() (yearly scheduler) and get_retention_date(dt) returning dt + 7 years. At submission time, set custom_lhdn_retention_date = today + 7 years on the Salary Slip. Yearly archival job marks records where retention_date < today as archived (custom_lhdn_archived=1). Add before_amend hook blocking amendment of archived records. Malaysian Income Tax Act requires 7-year retention of all e-invoice records.

userStories.title: Implement worker type gate: Employee vs Contractor vs Director for LHDN scope
userStories.description: Add custom_worker_type (Select: Employee | Contractor | Director, default: Employee) to Employee DocType. Update exemption_filter.py: if custom_worker_type='Employee', return False immediately (employment income under contract of service is exempt per LHDN FAQ). Add get_default_classification_code(worker_type) returning '037' for Contractor, '036' for Director, '022' for others. Update payload_builder to use this as fallback when component has no explicit classification code.
acceptanceCriteria: Employee DocType has custom_worker_type Select with options: Employee | Contractor | Director (default: Employee)
should_submit_to_lhdn returns False when custom_worker_type='Employee' regardless of custom_requires_self_billed_invoice value
should_submit_to_lhdn returns True when custom_worker_type='Contractor' AND custom_requires_self_billed_invoice=1
should_submit_to_lhdn returns True when custom_worker_type='Director' AND custom_requires_self_billed_invoice=1
get_default_classification_code('Contractor') returns '037'
get_default_classification_code('Director') returns '036'
payload_builder uses get_default_classification_code as fallback when no component-level code set

Employee

Add get_default_classification_code(worker_type: str) -> str: return {'Contractor': '037', 'Director': '036'}.get(worker_type, '022')
Update payload_builder: import get_default_classification_code; fallback = get_default_classification_code(employee.custom_worker_type); code = component.custom_lhdn_classification_code or fallback
LHDN FAQ: 'Employment income (salary paid to employees under a contract of service) is exempt from self-billed e-invoice requirements'

userStories.title: Implement foreign currency to MYR conversion in UBL payload builder
userStories.description: Update payload_builder.py to always emit DocumentCurrencyCode='MYR'. When doc.currency != 'MYR', multiply all earnings amounts by doc.conversion_rate (using Decimal). Add TaxCurrencyCode for non-MYR source currencies. Raise ValidationError when foreign currency slip has conversion_rate == 0 or None. Foreign workers paid in foreign currency are common in Malaysian payroll and LHDN requires invoicing in MYR.
acceptanceCriteria: cbc:DocumentCurrencyCode element always contains 'MYR' in all generated XML
When doc.currency='MYR': amounts used directly, no conversion factor applied
When doc.currency='USD' and conversion_rate=4.5: each eligible earnings amount is Decimal(amount) * Decimal('4.5')
When doc.currency != 'MYR' and conversion_rate == 0 or None: raises frappe.ValidationError('Exchange rate required for foreign currency salary slip')
When doc.currency != 'MYR': XML includes <cbc:TaxCurrencyCode>{doc.currency}</cbc:TaxCurrencyCode>
[TDD GREEN] bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_payload_builder -- ALL tests pass. Zero failures, zero errors.
technicalNotes: Add to payload_builder.py build_salary_slip_xml
Always: ET.SubElement(invoice, CBC+'DocumentCurrencyCode').text = 'MYR' (position: after InvoiceTypeCode)

Currency check: if doc.currency != 'MYR': conv = Decimal(str(doc.conversion_rate or 0)); if conv == 0: frappe.throw('Exchange rate required', frappe.ValidationError); ET.SubElement(invoice, CBC+'TaxCurrencyCode').text = doc.currency
Amount per line: amount_myr = quantize(Decimal(str(e.amount)) * conv) if doc.currency != 'MYR' else quantize(Decimal(str(e.amount)))
For MYR: conv = Decimal('1') so formula is uniform

userStories.title: Explicitly exclude employer statutory contributions (EPF/SOCSO/EIS) from self-billed invoice lines
userStories.description: Update payload_builder.py to define EMPLOYER_STATUTORY_COMPONENTS frozenset and filter doc.earnings to exclude any row whose salary_component is in this set. Also add custom_lhdn_exclude_from_invoice Check field to Salary Component for custom exclusions. Employer EPF/SOCSO/EIS contributions are the employer's own statutory liability to government agencies -- they are NOT payments to the employee-as-supplier and must not appear in the self-billed invoice.
acceptanceCriteria: EMPLOYER_STATUTORY_COMPONENTS set defined in payload_builder.py: frozenset containing common Malaysian employer contribution component names
build_salary_slip_xml iterates eligible_earnings = [e for e in doc.earnings if e.salary_component not in EMPLOYER_STATUTORY_COMPONENTS and not custom_exclude_flag]
Salary Component has custom_lhdn_exclude_from_invoice Check field (default 0)
When custom_lhdn_exclude_from_invoice=1 on a component, that earnings row is excluded from invoice
Invoice TotalIncludingTax reflects only eligible earnings rows
Existing totals balance assertion still passes after exclusion logic
[TDD GREEN] bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_payload_builder -- ALL tests pass. Zero failures, zero errors.
technicalNotes: Add to payload_builder.py: EMPLOYER_STATUTORY_COMPONENTS = frozenset({'EPF - Employer', 'SOCSO - Employer', 'EIS - Employer', 'HRDF', 'HRDF Levy', 'Employer EPF', 'Employer SOCSO', 'Employer EIS', 'SIP - Employer', 'SIP Employer'})
Filter: eligible_earnings = [e for e in doc.earnings if e.salary_component not in EMPLOYER_STATUTORY_COMPONENTS]
Custom flag check: also exclude if frappe.db.get_value('Salary Component', e.salary_component, 'custom_lhdn_exclude_from_invoice') == 1
Add custom_lhdn_exclude_from_invoice Check field to Salary Component in fixtures/custom_fields.json (default 0)
LHDN rationale: employer statutory contributions are government-mandated employer obligations, not supplier payments

userStories.title: Add SST registration to supplier and buyer UBL PartyTaxScheme blocks
userStories.description: Add custom_sst_registration_number (Data, optional) to Employee and Company DocTypes. Update payload_builder.py to include cac:PartyTaxScheme in both AccountingSupplierParty and AccountingCustomerParty. Use 'NA' for non-SST-registered parties. Tax category on invoice lines remains 'E' (Exempt) -- SST registration identification is a mandatory UBL field independent of whether the payment is SST-taxed.
acceptanceCriteria: Employee DocType has custom_sst_registration_number (Data, optional) field
Company DocType has custom_sst_registration_number (Data, optional) field
When employee.custom_sst_registration_number is empty: AccountingSupplierParty includes cac:PartyTaxScheme with RegistrationName='NA' and TaxScheme/ID='NA'
When employee.custom_sst_registration_number is set: RegistrationName=SST_number, TaxScheme/ID='SST'
AccountingCustomerParty (Company/Buyer) also includes cac:PartyTaxScheme with same logic
Tax category on all line items remains 'E' (Exempt) -- SST registration does not change payroll tax treatment
[TDD GREEN] bench --site frontend run-tests --module lhdn_payroll_integration.tests.test_payload_builder -- ALL tests pass. Zero failures, zero errors.
technicalNotes: Add custom_sst_registration_number to Employee and Company in fixtures/custom_fields.json: fieldtype=Data, label='SST Registration Number', description='Enter SST reg number or leave blank (will use NA)'
UBL path: cac:Party > cac:PartyTaxScheme > cbc:RegistrationName (SST reg or 'NA') + cac:TaxScheme > cbc:ID ('SST' or 'NA')
Helper: def get_party_tax_scheme(sst_reg): name = sst_reg or 'NA'; scheme = 'SST' if sst_reg else 'NA'; return (name, scheme)
LHDN v1.1 spec: SST Registration Number field is mandatory -- must appear as 'NA' if not registered
Do NOT change tax category from 'E' to 'S' for payroll items -- salary self-billed invoices are always exempt from SST
